name: Landstalker - The Treasures of King Nole
description: Landstalker: The Treasures of King Nole is a classic Action-RPG with an isometric view (also known as "2.5D").

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: The goal to accomplish in order to complete the seed.

options.label: Spawn Region
options.description: List of spawn locations that can be picked by the randomizer.

options.label: Jewel Count
options.description: Determines the number of jewels to find to be able to reach Kazalt.

options.label: Progressive Armors
options.description: When obtaining an armor, you get the next armor tier instead of getting the specific armor tier that was placed here by randomization.

options.label: Use Record Book
options.description: Gives a Record Book item in starting inventory, allowing to save the game anywhere.

options.label: Use Spell Book
options.description: Gives a Spell Book item in starting inventory, allowing to warp back to the starting location at any time.

options.label: Shop Prices Factor
options.description: Applies a percentage factor on all prices in shops.

options.label: Combat Difficulty
options.description: Determines the overall combat difficulty in the game by modifying both monsters HP & damage.

options.label: Teleport Tree Requirements
options.description: Determines the requirements to be able to use a teleport tree pair.

options.label: Shuffle Trees
options.description: If enabled, all teleportation trees will be shuffled into new pairs.

options.label: Ensure Ekeeke In Shops
options.description: Ensures an EkeEke will always be for sale in one shop per region in the game.

options.label: Remove Gumi Boulder
options.description: Removes the boulder between Gumi and Ryuma, which is usually a one-way path.

options.label: Allow Whistle Usage Behind Trees
options.description: In Greenmaze, Einstein Whistle can only be used to call Cutter from the intended side by default.

options.label: Handle Damage Boosting In Logic
options.description: Adds damage boosting as a logical rule, removing any requirements involving Iron Boots or Fireproof Boots.

options.label: Handle Enemy Jumping In Logic
options.description: Adds jumping on enemies' heads as a logical rule.

options.label: Handle Tree Cutting Glitch In Logic
options.description: Adds tree-cutting glitch as a logical rule, enabling access to both chests behind magic trees in Mir Tower Sector without having Axe Magic.

options.label: Hint Count
options.description: Determines the number of Foxy NPCs that will be scattered across the world, giving various types of hints

options.label: Revive Using Ekeeke
options.description: In the vanilla game, when you die, you are automatically revived by Friday using an EkeEke.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.
